opportunities.title: Fall Design Intern

opportunities.title: Hardware Design Intern, Software Defined Radio Team (Fall 2026)
opportunities.eligibility: Currently enrolled at a four-year university and pursuing Electrical Engineering or an equivalent degree, with hands-on experience designing, building, and testing PCBA hardware and a foundation in analog, digital, mixed-signal, or RF design. evidence: Astranis's official Greenhouse API returned job 4691163006 as active with an employer application URL on July 19, 2026; Greenhouse records the posting as updated June 30, 2026.

opportunities.title: Network Design Intern (Fall 2026, 4 months)
opportunities.location: Scarborough, Ontario, Canada - hybrid, minimum two office days per week
opportunities.eligibility: Working toward a bachelor's or master's degree in Systems Engineering, Electrical or Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a similar field; available full time for 40 hours per week from September through December 2026 and able to work at least two days per week in the Toronto office. Network principles, Ethernet/IP, routing, high availability, VPN, RF networking, and programming or scripting knowledge are requested.
evidence: Hitachi Rail's official Workday API returned requisition R1012963 as an existing open vacancy with an employer application URL on July 19, 2026; the employer records a July 7, 2026 posting date.

opportunities.title: Systems Design Intern (Fall 2026, 12 months)
opportunities.location: Scarborough, Ontario, Canada - hybrid, minimum two office days per week
opportunities.eligibility: Working toward a bachelor's degree in Electrical, Computer, or Systems Engineering or an equivalent field; available full time for 40 hours per week from September 2026 through August 2027 and able to work onsite at least two days per week. C++, Python, specification-driven hardware and software systems, DOORS or Polarion, and mechanical or dynamic-motion analysis are preferred.
evidence: Hitachi Rail's official Workday API returned requisition R1012441 as an existing vacancy with an employer application URL on July 19, 2026; the employer records a July 7, 2026 posting date.

The official posting confirms a 12-month Fall 2026 hybrid internship/co-op in Scarborough, 40 hours per week, at least two office days weekly, and pay of $23-$30 CAD per hour. It does not list an application deadline.

opportunities.title: Fall 2026 Co-Op - Analog Design Engineer (NC)
opportunities.eligibility: Currently pursuing an MS or PhD in Electrical Engineering or a related field. Interns must be within commuting distance or relocate before the internship, and candidates must be able to access controlled technical data without Cirrus Logic obtaining an export license.

opportunities.title: Fall 2026 Co-Op - Digital Design Engineer
opportunities.eligibility: Currently pursuing an MS or PhD in Electrical Engineering or a related field. Applicants need digital-signal-processing knowledge, proficiency with Verilog and Synopsys-based design flows, Matlab experience, and familiarity with PWM, transistor-level simulators, and place-and-route tools. Interns must be within commuting distance or relocate before the internship, and candidates must be able to access controlled technical data without Cirrus Logic obtaining an export license.
evidence: Cirrus Logic's official EU Lever feed returned posting 285c6096-5bc0-438e-abc6-b9768891167d as active on July 19, 2026 and records its creation on July 14, 2026.

The official posting confirms a full-time, 12-16 week Fall 2026 hybrid co-op in Greensboro covering RTL design, logic simulation, functional verification, synthesis, behavioral modeling, and lab-test support. Compensation and an application deadline are not listed.

opportunities.title: Experience Design Intern
opportunities.eligibility: Applicants need business-level English and German, normally at least C1 in each, plus a recently completed degree in Interaction Design, HCI, or a related design discipline; candidates in the middle of a master's degree are also accepted. A portfolio, advanced Figma skills, experience with GenAI design or prototyping tools, availability for six months ideally from early October, and legal authorization to live and work in Germany are required. The official posting confirms hybrid experience-design work, a six-month commitment ideally starting in early October, portfolio and Figma requirements, business-level English and German, and existing German work authorization. It does not list compensation or an application deadline.

opportunities.title: Product Design Intern
